focalElement: symmetric pair of bronze-and-gold grappling gauntlets with three-pronged steel claws and coiled chains
secondaryElement: crimson-ruby gem in each gauntlet housing; bronze-crimson double-burst backdrop
notes: tib8 — bespoke item-check opener portrait (nano-banana-pro, 2K webp).
Wired on card id `grapnels` (role='item'; breaks Voltwyrm T3's guard). Twin grapple gauntlets, distinct from the single-launcher `grapplethorn`.
